message:
test(oracle): add 22 conformance tests (s469-s490) covering NULL ordering, multi-table JOIN aggregates, boolean WHERE, derived tables, COLLATE NOCASE, IN subqueries, LAG/LEAD defaults, GROUP BY expressions, triggers, UPSERT DO UPDATE, savepoints, CASE in aggregates, type affinity, FILTER clause, named WINDOW, INSERT OR IGNORE, expression indexes, multi-column PK, UNIQUE constraints, aggregate FILTER

20 pass, 2 ignored (expression indexes, type affinity coercion). 0 mismatches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
